aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Restless push

💼 Career: Tum jaldi result chahoge, par delay frustration la sakta hai

❤️ Love: Impatience se choti baat bigad sakti hai

💰 Money: Risky decision avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Patience practice karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum process ko rush karke outcome kharab kar dete ho
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Grounded strength

💼 Career: Tumhara steady kaam trust build karega

❤️ Love: Stability aur comfort feel hoga

💰 Money: Slow but secure growth

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tumhara slow approach hi long-term win deta hai
gemini:
♊ Gemini
